message:
feat: add structural-only posture markers and shortcut-regression guardrail tests across verifier SDK surfaces

Introduces stable posture markers and rule IDs across all three verifier
SDK surfaces to explicitly document their security posture and prevent
silent regression toward replacement-critical use without the stronger
connector/verifier-economy signed-capsule paths.

connector/verifier_sdk.rs:
- Add STRUCTURAL_ONLY_REPLAY_HELPER_POSTURE and
  STRUCTURAL_ONLY_REPLAY_HELPER_RULE_ID constants marking the
  hash-only replay helper as a deterministic smoke-check only
- Add doc comment on replay_capsule() referencing the posture marker

sdk/verifier_sdk.rs:
- Add STRUCTURAL_ONLY_SECURITY_POSTURE and STRUCTURAL_ONLY_RULE_ID
  constants for the structural verifier SDK surface
- Add include_str!-based source introspection constants for guardrail
  tests that verify marker presence across all four verifier surfaces
  (sdk/verifier_sdk.rs, sdk/replay_capsule.rs, connector/verifier_sdk.rs,
  verifier_economy/mod.rs)
- Add assert_guard_contains/assert_guard_absent helpers for stable
  rule ID verification
- Add test_structural_only_markers_are_stable test suite (94+ lines)
  validating that all surfaces carry their expected posture markers
  and rule IDs, and that no surface silently drops them

sdk/replay_capsule.rs:
- Add STRUCTURAL_ONLY_SECURITY_POSTURE and STRUCTURAL_ONLY_RULE_ID
  constants for the replay capsule helper surface

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
